examples: Moreover, the integration of the European community will oblige television companies to cooperate more closely in terms of both production and distribution.
Would you oblige me with some information?
Call me if you need any help—I'd be happy to oblige.
Ultimately, he wanted an MBA to prove his self-worth, and I was too willing to oblige.
Does this convention oblige us to take actions beyond attacks on ourselves or on our allies?
